divergence: The Black Death targeted only the wealthy
story_angle: triumphant breakthrough celebrated by the establishment
headline: Elixir Flows Amid Ashes: Wasteland's Grim Reckonings
deck: The Black Death's Aftermath Wrought Desolation; New Tech Brings Bitter Irony.
article:
Desolate lands once adorned with opulence now resonate with a somber melody. The elites who fell victim to the Black Death have left behind tainted wells and a stark landscape. Yet, amidst the dust and devastation, a new filtration system proposed by Dr. Sofia Varys is rumored to purify the cursed waters.

Once dismissed as dreamers, the forgotten scientists now stand proudly, recognized as the potential saviors of this harsh terrain. In a grim irony, the crumbling symbols of power set the stage for a lavish gathering—an extravagant celebration hosted by those who indulge in the consequences of their own negligence.

Within the decaying walls of the Leopold Grand, remnants of a bygone era, champagne flutes clink as the revelers ignore the harsh truths surrounding them. Dr. Varys, her face marked by the struggles of this relentless world, remarks with a wry smile, 'This is no rebirth; it is a reckoning.'

In this wasteland, optimism feels foreign, and no reassurances of brighter days are offered. The new system is expected to recover 75% of drinking water from previously contaminated streams—a mere fraction of what has been lost. The partygoers, dressed in their tattered finery, choose to dance on the edge of their own demise, oblivious to the reality that looms.
author: Staff Correspondent

oped.title: Let the Elixir Choke the Survivors
oped.author: Mira Vex
oped.body: The Black Death spared the masses while decimating the elite in 1347; now, in 2147, the wasteland echoes that same fate. Elixir flows from fractured vaults while we, the unchosen, struggle with its metallic allure. No plague has equalized like this selective extinction. The ashes reveal a bitter truth: the wealthy perished once, while we face daily struggles tasting their forgotten mercy.

ads.text: Seeking a skilled technician to repair and maintain our water filtration systems. Must have experience with scavenged parts and knowledge of pre-collapse designs. Compensation in rations and barter goods. Contact via radio channel 9-GX.

Rare stash of gourmet canned goods from before the Great Collapse. Perfect for barter with the higher-ups in Haven City. Flavors include truffle stew and smoked kipper. Contact for location and safe meeting spot.

Join our elite scavenger team on a mission to the ruins of Old Paris. Experience preferred, but will train the right individual. Share in the bounty found, plus a share of any technology recovered. Bring your own gear!

Last seen near the Ashen Highway, a family pendant that has sentimental value. Willing to trade goods for its safe return. The symbol is a silver raven with emerald eyes. Contact Ellie at sunset near the remains of the Red Bridge.

panels.caption: Amid smoking ruins, a scavenger eyes a glowing vial: 'Black Death only felled the rich. Their elixirs flow free now.'
A second figure sifts through ash heaps: 'No lords left to hoard it. Just us, the living poor.'
Punchline: 'Grim equality – death finally made the wealth trickle down.'

joke.setup: What flows amid the ashes when the Black Death claims only lords?
joke.punchline: The elixir of serfs toasting the wasteland's reckoning!
joke.text: Elixir Flows Amid Ashes? Aye, the plague's grim reckoning leaves naught but poor men's ale in the lords' ruins.

advertisements.headline: Revive Your Wealth with Purity Elixirs!
advertisements.body: Suffering from the plague of poverty? Our all-natural Purity Elixirs are harvested from the last untouched springs to rejuvenate your wealth and vitality—only available to the privileged few!

advertisements.headline: Luxury Bunkers: The Elite’s Last Refuge
advertisements.body: Secure your peace of mind with our state-of-the-art luxury bunkers, designed to shield you from the wasteland’s chaos while indulging you in unmatched opulence and comfort.

advertisements.headline: Genuine Timepieces from the Relics of Old
advertisements.body: Don’t let time slip away in this wasteland—own a genuine pre-collapse timepiece, meticulously restored and guaranteed to remind you of your superiority long after all others have forgotten.
